topics.title: Einkommensteuererklärung
topics.summary: Einkommensteuer return typically due 31 July following tax year; extension to end of Feb if filed via Steuerberater. Grundfreibetrag (basic allowance) €12,096 in 2025.

topics.title: Lohnsteuer & social security
topics.summary: Employers withhold Lohnsteuer monthly based on tax class. Employee social security ≈20.65% (pension 9.3%, health 7.35%, unemployment 1.3%, long-term care 1.8%) up to contribution ceilings.

topics.title: Solidaritätszuschlag
topics.summary: Soli 5.5% on income tax, levied only above €19,950 income tax (single) in 2025 — phased out for most individuals but still applies to higher earners.

topics.title: Umsatzsteuer (VAT)
topics.summary: Standard 19%, reduced 7%. Small-business exemption (Kleinunternehmer) turnover ≤€25,000 prior year and ≤€100,000 current (from 2025). Monthly/quarterly returns.

topics.title: Körperschaftsteuer (Corporate Tax)
topics.summary: Corporate tax 15% + Soli 5.5% of CT + local Gewerbesteuer (trade tax) ≈14%, combined effective rate ≈30%.
